Data Engineer
Google

About the Role

We're looking for a Data Engineer to join our Cloud Data team. You'll build and maintain scalable data pipelines that power analytics and machine learning across Google Cloud products.

Responsibilities
- Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines using Apache Beam and Dataflow
- Develop and optimize data models in BigQuery for analytics and reporting
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to build feature engineering pipelines
- Monitor data quality and implement automated testing for data pipelines
- Participate in on-call rotation for production data systems

Requirements
- 3+ years of experience in data engineering or related field
- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL
- Experience with cloud data platforms (GCP preferred, AWS acceptable)
- Experience with data pipeline orchestration tools (Airflow, dbt, or similar)
- Familiarity with data warehousing concepts and dimensional modeling

Nice to Have
- Experience with Apache Spark or Apache Beam
- Knowledge of machine learning pipelines and MLOps
- Experience with Kubernetes and containerized deployments
- Familiarity with Terraform for infrastructure as code
